extract.script: () => { const pickText = (node) => (node.innerText || node.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const pageText = pickText(document.body); if (pageText.includes('页面不存在')) { return [{ citation_id: 'cnki-page-status', title: 'CNKI page unavailable or moved', access_mode: 'authorized-browser', source_provider: 'cnki', notes: pageText.slice(0, 240) }]; } const nodes = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[class*=result], li, tr, a, input, button')).slice(0, 40); return nodes.map((node, idx) => ({ citation_id: `cnki-${idx + 1}`, title: pickText(node), access_mode: 'authorized-browser', source_provider: 'cnki', notes: [node.id ? `id=${node.id}` : '', node.className ? `class=${String(node.className)}` : '', 'browser-captured block from CNKI page; refine selectors if the provider restores thesis search UI'].filter(Boolean).join('; ') })).filter(row => row.title && row.title.length > 6); }
